CustomField.formula: CASE(Project__r.strk__Site__r.HT_Legal_Entity__c, 'PI Telecom Infrastructure LLC', 'PI Telecom Infrastructure, LLC', 'Harmoni Towers AssetCo II LLC','Harmoni Towers AssetCo II, LLC', 'Harmoni Towers AssetCo LLC','Harmoni Towers AssetCo, LLC', 'PI Telecom Infrastructure T, LLC','PI Telecom Infrastructure T LLC', 'PI Telecom Infrastructure V, LLC','PI Telecom Infrastructure V LLC', 'PI Telecom Infrastructure A, LLC','PI Telecom Infrastructure A LLC', TEXT(Project__r.strk__Site__r.HT_Legal_Entity__c))
CustomField.label: Site Legal Entity
